name: rag-examples
description: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) examples for AI Tutorial

scripts.test:rag: ROOT=$(cd ../.. && pwd) && for f in basic_rag.ts rag_semantic.ts search_lexical.ts search_inverted_index.ts search_semantic.ts search_hybrid.ts cross_encoder_reranking.ts rag_iterative.ts rag_graph.ts rag_hybrid_data.ts pdf_needle_search.ts pdf_hierarchical_summary.ts; do echo "\n=== Running $f ==="; (cd "$ROOT" && npx tsx "src/rag/$f") || exit 1; done
